## Workbench Controls (DO NOT MODIFY — Mandatory Rule #1)

| # | Name | Type | Line | Status | Logic |
|---|------|------|------|--------|-------|
| 1 | Device selector | `<select>` | 816 | wired | Switches between iPhone/iPad/Watch frames, re-renders all content |
| 2 | Component selector | `<select>` | 823 | wired | Isolates individual components or shows full chat, re-renders content |
| 3 | Dark/Light toggle | `<button>` | 840 | wired | Toggles `data-theme` attribute, updates CSS variables |
| 4 | Pen tool | `<button>` | 843 | wired | Activates drawing canvas overlay with color/size/eraser toolbar |
| 5 | Notes panel | `<button>` | 844 | wired | Toggles side panel with localStorage-persisted design notes |

---

## Interactive Elements (In-Device)

| # | Name | Type | Line (JS function) | Status | Current Logic | Swift Match |
|---|------|------|--------------------|--------|---------------|-------------|
| 1 | Hamburger menu button | `<button>` | `htmlNavBar()` ~1094 | wired | Calls `toggleSidebar(true)` — opens sidebar overlay | YES |
| 2 | New chat button (nav) | `<button>` | `htmlNavBar()` ~1097 | empty | No onclick handler — visual only | PARTIAL — Swift version calls `viewModel.newConversation()` |
| 3 | Mode card dismiss | `<div>` + `<button>` | `htmlModeCard()` ~1054 | wired | Calls `dismissCard()` — sets `modeCardDismissed = true` | YES |
| 4 | Mode pill (Fault Finder) | `<button>` | `htmlModeSelector()` ~1069 | wired | Calls `selectMode(0)` — updates currentMode, re-renders | YES |
| 5 | Mode pill (Learn) | `<button>` | `htmlModeSelector()` ~1069 | wired | Calls `selectMode(1)` | YES |
| 6 | Mode pill (Research) | `<button>` | `htmlModeSelector()` ~1069 | wired | Calls `selectMode(2)` | YES |
| 7 | Plus/attachment button | `<button>` | `htmlInputBar()` ~1081 | empty | No onclick — visual only | PARTIAL — Swift has PhotosPicker |
| 8 | Text input | `<input>` | `htmlInputBar()` ~1083 | wired | `oninput` toggles send button visibility + dismisses card. `onfocus` dismisses card. | YES |
| 9 | Send button | `<button>` | `htmlInputBar()` ~1085 | wired (visual) | Shows/hides based on input content. No actual send action. | PARTIAL — Swift sends to API |
| 10 | Sidebar conversation rows | `<button>` | `htmlSidebar()` ~1115 | wired | Calls `toggleSidebar(false)` — closes sidebar. Does NOT load conversation messages. | PARTIAL — Swift loads conversation |

## Mock Data (HTML)

| # | Name | Line | Contents | Swift Match |
|---|------|------|----------|-------------|
| 1 | `MOCK.conversations[0]` | 884 | "RCD keeps tripping" — 4 messages, Fault Finder mode | Matches `MockData.faultFinderConversation` |
| 2 | `MOCK.conversations[1]` | 924 | "Cable sizing for power circuits" — 4 messages, Learn mode | Matches `MockData.learnConversation` |
| 3 | `MOCK.conversations[2]` | 955 | "EV charger installation requirements" — 4 messages, Research mode | Matches `MockData.researchConversation` |

**Note:** HTML always renders mock data. Swift currently starts with empty conversations and uses real API. There is no mock data toggle in either platform.

---

## Swift-HTML Parity Issues

| # | Issue | Swift | HTML | Severity |
|---|-------|-------|------|----------|
| 1 | New chat button | Calls `viewModel.newConversation()` | No onclick handler | Medium |
| 2 | Send button | Sends to real API | Visual only, no action | Medium |
| 3 | Attachment button | PhotosPicker opens | No onclick | Medium |
| 4 | Sidebar row select | Loads conversation messages | Only closes sidebar | Medium |
| 5 | Link blocks | Non-tappable Text | Has `<a>` tag (clickable) | Low |
| 6 | Data source | Real API, empty start | Hardcoded mock data | High |
| 7 | Mock toggle | Not implemented | Not implemented | High |
